question: Where is the white square sink located in the bathroom? Select from the following options: (A) Above the brown wooden drawers. (B) Next to the white porcelain bathtub. (C) In front of the stained glass windows. (D) At the center of the bathroom.
answer_choices: Next to the white porcelain bathtub
In front of the stained glass windows
At the center of the bathroom

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A white square sink mounted on a wooden vanity with brown drawers below.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: No sink, no vanity, no drawers, no fixtures in the blacked-out area.
